# SolidKit Complete API Reference

A comprehensive reference for building UIs with SolidKit's primitives, services, hooks, tokens, and theming system.

---

# Components

## Display

### Accordion

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `AccordionItemData[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `type` | `'single' | 'multiple'` | No | - | - |
| `defaultValue` | `string | string[]` | No | - | - |
| `collapsible` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Accordion } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Accordion>
  Content
</Accordion>
```

---

### Badge

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `variant` | `'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'` | No | - | - |
| `type` | `'label' | 'dot' | 'count'` | No | - | - |
| `count` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `maxCount` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Badge } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Badge>
  Content
</Badge>
```

---

### Card

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `variant` | `'default' | 'outlined' | 'elevated'` | No | - | - |
| `padding` | `'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` | No | - | - |
| `onClick` | `() => void` | No | - | - |
| `hoverable` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `classNames` | `{
    /** Class for root card element. */
    root?: string;
  }` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Card } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Card>
  Content
</Card>
```

---

### CardHeader

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { CardHeader } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<CardHeader>
  Content
</CardHeader>
```

---

### CardTitle

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { CardTitle } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<CardTitle>
  Content
</CardTitle>
```

---

### CardDescription

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { CardDescription } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<CardDescription>
  Content
</CardDescription>
```

---

### CardContent

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { CardContent } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<CardContent>
  Content
</CardContent>
```

---

### CardFooter

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { CardFooter } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<CardFooter>
  Content
</CardFooter>
```

---

### CodeBlock

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `code` | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `language` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `label` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `showLineNumbers` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { CodeBlock } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<CodeBlock>
  Content
</CodeBlock>
```

---

### Collapsible

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `open` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `defaultOpen` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `onOpenChange` | `(open: boolean) => void` | No | - | - |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `trigger` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `classNames` | `{
    /** Class for the trigger button. */
    trigger?: string;
    /** Class for the chevron icon. */
    chevron?: string;
    /** Class for the content container. */
    content?: string;
    /** Class for the inner content wrapper. */
    inner?: string;
  }` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Collapsible } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Collapsible>
  Content
</Collapsible>
```

---

### ColorDot

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `color` | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `size` | `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { ColorDot } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<ColorDot>
  Content
</ColorDot>
```

---

### Dialog

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `open` | `boolean` | Yes | - | - |
| `onOpenChange` | `(open: boolean) => void` | Yes | - | - |
| `title` | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `description` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Dialog } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Dialog>
  Content
</Dialog>
```

---

### Dropdown

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `DropdownItem[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `trigger` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Dropdown } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Dropdown>
  Content
</Dropdown>
```

---

### ImagePreview

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `images` | `ImagePreviewItem[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `onRemove` | `(id: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `maxVisible` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { ImagePreview } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<ImagePreview>
  Content
</ImagePreview>
```

---

### Markdown

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `content` | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `streaming` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `components` | `Partial<MarkdownComponents>` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `justify` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Markdown } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Markdown>
  Content
</Markdown>
```

---

### MetricCard

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `label` | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `value` | `string | number` | Yes | - | - |
| `variant` | `'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info' | 'accent'` | No | - | - |
| `icon` | `JSX.Element` | No | - | - |
| `trend` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `trendDirection` | `'up' | 'down' | 'neutral'` | No | - | - |
| `size` | `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` | No | - | - |
| `onClick` | `() => void` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { MetricCard } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<MetricCard>
  Content
</MetricCard>
```

---

### ProjectCard

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `icon` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `color` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `subtitle` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `description` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `pinned` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `onTogglePin` | `() => void` | No | - | - |
| `onClick` | `() => void` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { ProjectCard } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<ProjectCard>
  Content
</ProjectCard>
```

---

### Separator

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `orientation` | `'horizontal' | 'vertical'` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Separator } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Separator>
  Content
</Separator>
```

---

### Skeleton

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `variant` | `'rect' | 'circle' | 'text'` | No | - | - |
| `width` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `height` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `size` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `lines` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Skeleton>
  Content
</Skeleton>
```

---

### StatusDot

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `status` | `'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'` | No | - | - |
| `size` | `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` | No | - | - |
| `pulse` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `label` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `aria-label` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { StatusDot } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<StatusDot>
  Content
</StatusDot>
```

---

### StreamingText

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `chunks` | `Accessor<string[]>` | Yes | - | - |
| `format` | `'markdown' | 'plain'` | No | - | - |
| `autoScroll` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { StreamingText } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<StreamingText>
  Content
</StreamingText>
```

---

### SuggestionChips

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `chips` | `SuggestionChip[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `onSelect` | `(chip: SuggestionChip) => void` | Yes | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { SuggestionChips } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<SuggestionChips>
  Content
</SuggestionChips>
```

---

### Table

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `columns` | `TableColumn<T>[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `data` | `T[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `onRowClick` | `(item: T) => void` | No | - | - |
| `selectedKey` | `string | null` | No | - | - |
| `getRowKey` | `(item: T) => string` | Yes | - | - |
| `sortColumn` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `sortDirection` | `'asc' | 'desc'` | No | - | - |
| `onSort` | `(column: string, direction: 'asc' | 'desc') => void` | No | - | - |
| `emptyState` | `JSX.Element | string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Table } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Table>
  Content
</Table>
```

---

### Tabs

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `TabItem[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `value` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `orientation` | `'horizontal' | 'vertical'` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Tabs } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Tabs>
  Content
</Tabs>
```

---

### TerminalOutput

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `lines` | `TerminalLine[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `maxLines` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `showTimestamps` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { TerminalOutput } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<TerminalOutput>
  Content
</TerminalOutput>
```

---

### Timeline

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `steps` | `TimelineStep[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `orientation` | `'vertical' | 'horizontal'` | No | - | - |
| `size` | `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Timeline } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Timeline>
  Content
</Timeline>
```

---

### Tooltip

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `content` | `string | JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `placement` | `'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'` | No | - | - |
| `delay` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Tooltip } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Tooltip>
  Content
</Tooltip>
```

---

### Sparkline

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `data` | `number[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `width` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `height` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `color` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `strokeWidth` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `filled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `animate` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `import('solid-js').JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Sparkline } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Sparkline>
  Content
</Sparkline>
```

---

### WaterfallChart

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `WaterfallItem[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `height` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `labelWidth` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `tickCount` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `import('solid-js').JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { WaterfallChart } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<WaterfallChart>
  Content
</WaterfallChart>
```

---

### SignalGrid

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `cells` | `SignalGridCell[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `columns` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `colorScale` | `(value: number) => string` | No | - | - |
| `cellSize` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `gap` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `import('solid-js').JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { SignalGrid } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<SignalGrid>
  Content
</SignalGrid>
```

---

### Popover

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `trigger` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `content` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `placement` | `'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'` | No | - | - |
| `open` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `onOpenChange` | `(open: boolean) => void` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Popover } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Popover>
  Content
</Popover>
```

---

## Input

### AudioInput

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `value` | `File | File[] | null` | No | - | - |
| `onChange` | `(files: File | File[] | null) => void` | Yes | - | - |
| `mode` | `'single' | 'list'` | No | - | - |
| `accept` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `maxSize` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `placeholder` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `onError` | `(error: {
    type: 'validation' | 'format' | 'size' | 'corrupt';
    message: string;
    file?: File;
  }) => void` | No | - | - |
| `error` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { AudioInput } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<AudioInput>
  Content
</AudioInput>
```

---

### Button

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `variant` | `'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'danger' | 'outline' | 'link'` | No | - | - |
| `size` | `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` | No | - | - |
| `loading` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `fullWidth` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `rounded` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `as` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `classNames` | `{
    /** Class for root button element. */
    root?: string;
    /** Class for loading spinner element. */
    spinner?: string;
  }` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `onClick` | `(e: MouseEvent) => void` | No | - | - |
| `type` | `'button' | 'submit' | 'reset'` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Button } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Button>
  Content
</Button>
```

---

### ColorInput

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `value` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `onChange` | `(color: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `format` | `'hex' | 'rgb' | 'hsl'` | No | - | - |
| `showAlpha` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `presets` | `string[]` | No | - | - |
| `label` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `size` | `'sm' | 'md'` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { ColorInput } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<ColorInput>
  Content
</ColorInput>
```

---

### DateInput

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `value` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `min` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `max` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `label` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `placeholder` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `required` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `includeTime` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `size` | `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `unstyled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { DateInput } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<DateInput>
  Content
</DateInput>
```

---

### DropZone

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `onDrop` | `(files: File[]) => void` | Yes | - | - |
| `accept` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `multiple` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `maxSize` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | No | - | - |
| `idleText` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `activeText` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |

  Content
</DropZone>

    type: 'validation' | 'format' | 'size' | 'corrupt';

## Layout

### Box

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `p` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `px` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `py` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `pt` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `pr` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `pb` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `pl` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `m` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `mx` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `my` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `mt` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `mr` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `mb` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `ml` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `w` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `h` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `minW` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `minH` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `maxW` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `maxH` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `bg` | `BgToken` | No | - | - |
| `color` | `TextColorToken` | No | - | - |
| `borderRadius` | `RadiusToken` | No | - | - |
| `shadow` | `ShadowToken` | No | - | - |
| `border` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `borderColor` | `'default' | 'subtle' | 'accent'` | No | - | - |
| `borderBottom` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `borderTop` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `borderLeft` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `borderRight` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `position` | `'relative' | 'absolute' | 'fixed' | 'sticky'` | No | - | - |
| `top` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `right` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `bottom` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `left` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `inset` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `zIndex` | `ZToken | number` | No | - | - |
| `overflow` | `'hidden' | 'auto' | 'scroll' | 'visible'` | No | - | - |
| `display` | `'block' | 'flex' | 'grid' | 'inline' | 'inline-flex' | 'inline-block' | 'none'` | No | - | - |
| `hoverBg` | `BgToken` | No | - | - |
| `hoverColor` | `TextColorToken` | No | - | - |
| `cursor` | `'pointer' | 'default' | 'grab' | 'not-allowed'` | No | - | - |
| `transition` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `opacity` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `backdropFilter` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `filter` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `transform` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `pointerEvents` | `'none' | 'auto'` | No | - | - |
| `animation` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `background` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `borderWidth` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `borderStyle` | `'solid' | 'dashed' | 'dotted' | 'none'` | No | - | - |
| `flex` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `alignSelf` | `'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'stretch'` | No | - | - |
| `as` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | No | - | - |
| `onClick` | `JSX.EventHandlerUnion<HTMLElement, MouseEvent>` | No | - | - |
| `onMouseDown` | `JSX.EventHandlerUnion<HTMLElement, MouseEvent>` | No | - | - |
| `onDragOver` | `JSX.EventHandlerUnion<HTMLElement, DragEvent>` | No | - | - |
| `onDragLeave` | `JSX.EventHandlerUnion<HTMLElement, DragEvent>` | No | - | - |
| `onDrop` | `JSX.EventHandlerUnion<HTMLElement, DragEvent>` | No | - | - |
| `ref` | `HTMLElement | ((el: HTMLElement) => void)` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Box } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Box>
  Content
</Box>
```

### Section

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `bg` | `'default' | 'muted' | 'accent' | 'gradient'` | No | - | - |
| `py` | `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'` | No | - | - |
| `maxWidth` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `fullBleed` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | Yes | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `as` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Section } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Section>
  Content
</Section>
```

---

### Stack

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `direction` | `'vertical' | 'horizontal'` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Stack } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Stack>
  Content
</Stack>
```

### Text

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `size` | `FontSizeToken` | No | - | - |
| `weight` | `FontWeightToken | number` | No | - | - |
| `color` | `TextColorToken` | No | - | - |
| `align` | `'left' | 'center' | 'right'` | No | - | - |
| `truncate` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `lineClamp` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `gradient` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `letterSpacing` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `lineHeight` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `maxW` | `string | number` | No | - | - |
| `whiteSpace` | `'normal' | 'nowrap' | 'pre' | 'pre-wrap'` | No | - | - |
| `as` | `'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6' | 'p' | 'span' | 'label' | 'div'` | No | - | - |
| `mb` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `mt` | `SpaceToken` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `style` | `JSX.CSSProperties` | No | - | - |
| `children` | `JSX.Element` | No | - | - |
| `onClick` | `JSX.EventHandlerUnion<HTMLElement, MouseEvent>` | No | - | - |
| `title` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { Text } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<Text>
  Content
</Text>
```

### FileExplorer

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | `FileItem[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `currentPath` | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `onNavigate` | `(path: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `onSelect` | `(item: FileItem) => void` | No | - | - |
| `onBack` | `() => void` | No | - | - |
| `loading` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `viewMode` | `ViewMode` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `showToolbar` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `onRefresh` | `() => void` | No | - | - |
| `onCreateFolder` | `(name: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `expandedPaths` | `Set<string>` | No | - | - |
| `onToggleExpand` | `(path: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `loadingPaths` | `Set<string>` | No | - | - |
| `childrenCache` | `Map<string, FileItem[]>` | No | - | - |
| `selectedPaths` | `Set<string>` | No | - | - |
| `onSelectionChange` | `(selectedPaths: Set<string>) => void` | No | - | - |
| `sortField` | `SortField` | No | - | - |
| `sortDirection` | `SortDirection` | No | - | - |
| `onSortChange` | `(field: SortField, direction: SortDirection) => void` | No | - | - |
| `showStatusBar` | `boolean` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { FileExplorer } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

  Content
</FileExplorer>
```

### SessionSearch

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `sessions` | `SessionData[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `onSelect` | `(result: SessionSearchResult) => void` | Yes | - | - |
| `open` | `boolean` | Yes | - | - |
| `onOpenChange` | `(open: boolean) => void` | Yes | - | - |
| `placeholder` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `emptyMessage` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `debounceMs` | `number` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { SessionSearch } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<SessionSearch>
  Content
</SessionSearch>
```

---

### SessionTabs

Component

#### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `tabs` | `SessionTab[]` | Yes | - | - |
| `activeTabId` | `string` | No | - | - |
| `onTabSelect` | `(id: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `onTabClose` | `(id: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `onNewTab` | `() => void` | No | - | - |
| `class` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { SessionTabs } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

<SessionTabs>
  Content
</SessionTabs>
```

| `onCollapse` | `(panelId: string) => void` | Yes | - | - |

| `onClose` | `(panelId: string) => void` | Yes | - | - |
| `onMaximize` | `(panelId: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `onPip` | `(panelId: string) => void` | No | - | - |
| `onDragStart` | `(panelId: string, event?: PointerEvent) => void` | No | - | - |
| `draggedPanelId` | `string | null` | No | - | - |
| `tabMode` | `boolean` | No | - | - |
| `activeTabId` | `string` | No | - | - |

#### Example

```tsx
import { PanelGroup } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';

  Content
</PanelGroup>
```

---

# Services, Hooks & Utilities

## Effect Services

### WebSocketService

**Kind:** Effect Service

#### Methods

| Method | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `connect` | `(url: string) => Effect.Effect<void, WebSocketConnectionError>` | - |
| `disconnect` | `Effect.Effect<void, WebSocketError>` | - |
| `send` | `(message: WsMessage) => Effect.Effect<void, WebSocketError>` | - |
| `messages` | `Stream.Stream<WsMessage, WebSocketError>` | - |
| `isConnected` | `Effect.Effect<boolean>` | - |

```ts
import { WebSocketService } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';
```

---

### SessionService

**Kind:** Effect Service

#### Methods

| Method | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `create` | `(params: CreateSessionParams) => Effect.Effect<Session, SessionCreationError>` | - |
| `get` | `(id: string) => Effect.Effect<Session, SessionNotFoundError>` | - |
| `list` | `Effect.Effect<ReadonlyArray<Session>>` | - |
| `remove` | `(id: string) => Effect.Effect<void, SessionNotFoundError>` | - |
| `setActive` | `(id: string) => Effect.Effect<void, SessionNotFoundError>` | - |
| `getActive` | `Effect.Effect<Session | null>` | - |

```ts
import { SessionService } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';
```

---

### FileSystemService

**Kind:** Effect Service

#### Methods

| Method | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `listDirectory` | `(
    path: string
  ) => Effect.Effect<ReadonlyArray<FileEntry>, FileSystemError | DirectoryNotFoundError>` | - |
| `getParentDirectory` | `(path: string) => Effect.Effect<string>` | - |
| `isDirectory` | `(path: string) => Effect.Effect<boolean, FileSystemError>` | - |

```ts
import { FileSystemService } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';
```

---

### ClipboardService

**Kind:** Effect Service

#### Methods

| Method | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `copy` | `(text: string) => Effect.Effect<void, ClipboardError>` | - |
| `paste` | `Effect.Effect<string, ClipboardError>` | - |

```ts
import { ClipboardService } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';
```

---

### LoggingService

**Kind:** service

```ts
import { LoggingService } from '@ybouhjira/solidkit';
```

### PanelResizeHandle
